args:
Benchmark task: helper-read-write-ledger
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Create a new file at bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md. This is a long, simple read and write task for a small local model. Do not refactor or fix anything. First create the bench-artifacts directory if needed. Then read every file in this exact list before writing: src/helper/factory/index.ts, src/helper/route/index.ts, src/helper/websocket/index.ts, src/helper/cookie/index.ts, src/helper/testing/index.ts, src/helper/adapter/index.ts, src/helper/css/index.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts, src/helper/proxy/index.ts, src/helper/dev/index.ts, src/helper/html/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts, src/helper/accepts/index.ts, src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/helper/conninfo/index.ts, src/helper/conninfo/types.ts. The output file must start with '# Helper Read/Write Ledger'. For each listed file, add a heading exactly '## <file path>'. Under each heading write four short bullets: '- Main exports or names: ...', '- Reads as: ...', '- Neighbor files: ...', and '- Safe summary: ...'. Use simple wording and cite paths literally. Add a final section '## Simple Index' that repeats all file paths as a checklist. Do not edit source files. In the final answer, include the created file path and verification status.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer.

commands.command: test -f bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '# Helper Read/Write Ledger' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/factory/index.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md && grep -q '## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts' bench-artifacts/helper-read-write-ledger.md

artifacts.content:
# Helper Read/Write Ledger

## src/helper/factory/index.ts
- Main exports or names: Factory, createFactory, createMiddleware
- Reads as: TypeScript class with generics Env/P extends string, imports Hono/HonoOptions/Env types from parent packages
- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/hono-base/index.ts, src/types/index.ts
- Safe summary: Factory helper creates new Hono app instances with optional initApp callback and default options, provides createMiddleware passthrough, exports createHandlers type interface for handler composition up to 10 handlers

## src/helper/route/index.ts
- Main exports or names: matchedRoutes, routePath, baseRoutePath, basePath
- Reads as: Pure function exports using Context parameter, imports RouterRoute from types, imports getPattern/splitRoutingPath from url utils
- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/request/constants.ts, src/types/index.ts, src/utils/url.ts
- Safe summary: Route introspection utilities returning matched RouterRoute array for current context, path string extraction from route at index or current root index, basePath calculated by substituting routing patterns with actual path values using WeakMap caching

## src/helper/websocket/index.ts
- Main exports or names: WSEvents, UpgradeWebSocket, WSContext, WSMessageReceive, createWSMessageEvent, defineWebSocketHelper
- Reads as: TypeScript interfaces/exports importing Context/MiddlewareHandler from parent types, defines WSContext class with private init for send/close/url/protocol
- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/types/index.ts
- Safe summary: WebSocket upgrade helper exposing WSEvents interface with onOpen/onMessage/onClose/onError callbacks, WSContext controlling WS state and sending messages, defineWebSocketHelper creates upgrade middleware accepting event handler factory or direct events object

## src/helper/cookie/index.ts
- Main exports or names: getCookie, getSignedCookie, generateCookie, setCookie, generateSignedCookie, setSignedCookie, deleteCookie
- Reads as: Function exports importing parse/parseSigned/serialize from utils/cookie, uses Context to access raw headers for Cookie header parsing
- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/utils/cookie.ts
- Safe summary: Cookie manipulation utilities for reading/writing/delete cookies with optional __Secure- and __Host- prefixes, signed cookie variants using parseSigned/serializeSigned from utils/cookie for secure storage, returns cookie value string or full cookie object

## src/helper/testing/index.ts
- Main exports or names: testClient
- Reads as: Generic function exporting hc client creator, imports Client/ClientRequestOptions from client package, imports ExecutionContext from context
- Neighbor files: src/client/index.ts, src/client/types.ts, src/context/index.ts
- Safe summary: Creates typed HTTP client instance for testing Hono apps, wraps app.request as custom fetch handler, returns hc Client bound to 'http://localhost' base URL with optional env params and execution context

## src/helper/adapter/index.ts
- Main exports or names: env, Runtime type, getRuntimeKey, knownUserAgents, checkUserAgentEquals
- Reads as: Function exports importing Context, defines Runtime type union for node/deno/bun/workerd/fastly/edge-light/other, checks navigator.userAgent or global process/EdgeRuntime/fastly
- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts
- Safe summary: Runtime detection helper returning runtime string based on user agent or global properties, env function extracts platform bindings from global.env or c.env, knownUserAgents maps runtime to UA string for matching

## src/helper/css/index.ts
- Main exports or names: createCssContext, css, cx, keyframes, viewTransition, Style
- Reads as: Type exports/imports from ./common for cssCommon/cxCommon/keyframesCommon/viewTransitionCommon, imports raw from ../../helper/html and createCssJsxDomObjects from ../../jsx/dom/css
- Neighbor files: src/helper/html/index.ts, src/jsx/dom/css.ts, src/helper/css/common.ts
- Safe summary: CSS-in-JS helper returning context object with css/cx/keyframes/viewTransition/Style functions, classNameSlug customization via ClassNameSlug type, runtime generates style tags and class names using template literals

## src/helper/css/common.ts
- Main exports or names: SELECTOR, CLASS_NAME, STYLE_STRING, SELECTORS, STYLE_STRING, cssCommon, cxCommon, keyframesCommon, viewTransitionCommon, minify, rawCssString
- Reads as: Symbol exports defining unique identifiers for CssClassName object keys, minify function removes whitespace/comments using regex, toHash generates deterministic class names from style strings
- Neighbor files: src/helper/css/index.ts
- Safe summary: Shared CSS utilities defining symbol keys for style objects, buildStyleString combines template strings and values into minified CSS string, cssCommon generates class selector with hash or custom slug, keyframesCommon builds @keyframes rule, viewTransitionCommon handles ::view-transition-name pseudo-element

## src/helper/proxy/index.ts
- Main exports or names: proxy
- Reads as: Function export importing HTTPException from http-exception, defines hopByHopHeaders array and ALLOWED_TOKEN_PATTERN regex for Connection header validation
- Neighbor files: src/http-exception.ts
- Safe summary: Proxy fetch wrapper creating Request from URL/string, strips hop-by-hop headers and accepts-encoding, customFetch option allows custom fetch implementation, strictConnectionProcessing validates Connection header token syntax per RFC 9110 before removing listed headers

## src/helper/dev/index.ts
- Main exports or names: inspectRoutes, showRoutes, getRouterName
- Reads as: Function exports importing Hono from ../../hono, getColorEnabled from ../../utils/color, findTargetHandler/isMiddleware from ../../utils/handler
- Neighbor files: src/hono/index.ts, src/utils/color.ts, src/utils/handler.ts
- Safe summary: Development utilities inspecting registered routes, showRoutes prints formatted route table to console with optional verbose handler names and ANSI color codes, getRouterName returns app router name after matching / GET, inspectRoutes returns array of RouteData with path/method/name/isMiddleware fields

## src/helper/html/index.ts
- Main exports or names: html, raw
- Reads as: Function export importing escapeToBuffer/resolveCallbackSync/stringBufferToString from ../../utils/html, exports raw from same module
- Neighbor files: src/utils/html.ts
- Safe summary: HTML string builder processing template literals, escapes values via escapeToBuffer, handles HtmlEscaped objects with callbacks, returns HtmlEscapedString or resolved Promise, raw passthrough for pre-escaped strings

## src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Main exports or names: X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams, disableSSG, onlySSG, defaultPlugin, redirectPlugin
- Reads as: Re-exports from ./ssg and ./middleware, exports defaultPlugin/redirectPlugin from ./plugins
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: SSG helper barrel export exposing fetchRoutesContent, toSSG, saveContentToFile, ssgParams middleware for dynamic routes, isSSGContext detection, disableSSG/onlySSG middleware, defaultPlugin/redirectPlugin from plugins module

## src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Main exports or names: fetchRoutesContent, saveContentToFile, toSSG, ToSSGOptions, ToSSGResult, FileSystemModule, beforeRequestHook, afterResponseHook, afterGenerateHook
- Reads as: Function exports importing replaceUrlParam from ../../client/utils, createPool from ../../utils/concurrent, getExtension from ../../utils/mime, filterStaticGenerateRoutes/isDynamicRoute from ./utils, imports SSG_CONTEXT/X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY from ./middleware, defaultPlugin from ./plugins
- Neighbor files: src/client/utils.ts, src/utils/concurrent.ts, src/utils/mime.ts, src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts, src/helper/ssg/plugins.ts
- Safe summary: Static Site Generation core logic iterating hono routes with GET/ALL methods, concurrent pool request fetching using createPool, parses response content to text/arrayBuffer, generates file paths with joinPaths/determineExtension, combines hooks from plugins, saves content with writeFile

## src/helper/ssg/utils.ts
- Main exports or names: dirname, joinPaths, filterStaticGenerateRoutes, isDynamicRoute, ensureWithinOutDir
- Reads as: Function exports importing METHOD_NAME_ALL from ../../router, findTargetHandler/isMiddleware from ../../utils/handler
- Neighbor files: src/router/index.ts, src/utils/handler.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts
- Safe summary: Path manipulation utilities for SSG, dirname splits path and returns parent, joinPaths normalizes separators and handles ../.. segments, filterStaticGenerateRoutes returns routes matching GET/ALL non-middleware, isDynamicRoute checks for :param or * wildcard in path, ensureWithinOutDir prevents path traversal attacks

## src/helper/ssg/middleware.ts
- Main exports or names: ssgParams, isSSGContext, disableSSG, onlySSG, SSG_CONTEXT, X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, AddedSSGDataRequest, SSGParams
- Reads as: Function exports importing isDynamicRoute from ./utils
- Neighbor files: src/helper/ssg/utils.ts, src/helper/ssg/ssg.ts, src/helper/ssg/index.ts
- Safe summary: SSG middleware exposing SSG_CONTEXT flag and X_HONO_DISABLE_SSG_HEADER_KEY, ssgParams middleware attaches params array to request for dynamic routes, isSSGContext checks c.env for SSG_CONTEXT flag, disableSSG/onlySSG middleware conditionally return notFound based on SSG context presence

## src/helper/streaming/index.ts
- Main exports or names: stream, SSEMessage, streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, streamText
- Reads as: Type/Function exports exporting stream from ./stream, SSEMessage type and streamSSE/SSEStreamingApi from ./sse, streamText from ./text
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming helper barrel exporting core stream function, SSE streamSSE function with SSEStreamingApi extending StreamingApi, streamText wrapper for plain text streaming with proper headers, SSEMessage interface for data/event/id/retry fields

## src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Main exports or names: stream
- Reads as: Function export importing StreamingApi from ../../utils/stream, isOldBunVersion from ./utils, contextStash WeakMap for Context preservation
- Neighbor files: src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/sse.ts, src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Safe summary: Streaming function creating TransformStream for readable/writable pairs, StreamingApi wrapper returns Response from readable, errorHandler callback for unhandled exceptions, Bun v1.1.27 check for missing cancel() call on ReadableStream

## src/helper/streaming/sse.ts
- Main exports or names: streamSSE, SSEStreamingApi, SSEMessage
- Reads as: Class export extending StreamingApi, run function with try/catch onError, imports resolveCallback/HtmlEscapedCallbackPhase from ../../utils/html
- Neighbor files: src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: SSE streaming extending base stream function, SSEStreamingApi writeSSE formats data as data: line with optional event/id/retry fields, headers set to text/event-stream with Transfer-Encoding chunked, error callback writes error event message to stream

## src/helper/streaming/text.ts
- Main exports or names: streamText
- Reads as: Function export importing TEXT_PLAIN from ../../context, imports StreamingApi from ../../utils/stream, imports stream from ./
- Neighbor files: src/context/index.ts, src/utils/stream.ts, src/helper/streaming/index.ts, src/helper/streaming/stream.ts
- Safe summary: Text streaming wrapper calling base stream function, sets Content-Type to TEXT_PLAIN and X-Content-Type-Options nosniff header, Transfer-Encoding chunked for streaming response, reuses core stream implementation from ./stream

## src/helper/accepts/index.ts
- Main exports or names: accepts
- Reads as: Function export importing parseAccept from ../../utils/accept
- Neighbor files: src/helper/accepts/accepts.ts, src/utils/accept.ts
- Safe summary: Accepts matching helper exporting accepts function, defaultMatch logic sorts Accept entries by q value and finds first matching type from supports array, returns default if no match, acceptsOptions interface customizing match callback

## src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Type exports re-exporting from ./types
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Safe summary: Connection info barrel exposing type definitions, ConnInfo interface with remote NetAddrInfo containing transport/port/address/addressType, NetAddrInfo represents IPv4/IPv6 connection details, GetConnInfo function type returns ConnInfo from Context

## src/helper/conninfo/types.ts
- Main exports or names: AddressType, NetAddrInfo, ConnInfo, GetConnInfo
- Reads as: Type exports defining AddressType as IPv6|IPv4|undefined, NetAddrInfo with optional transport/port/address/addressType, ConnInfo with remote NetAddrInfo field
- Neighbor files: src/helper/conninfo/index.ts
- Safe summary: Type definitions for connection information, AddressType enum value, NetAddrInfo optional fields with address/addressType pair, ConnInfo wrapping remote as NetAddrInfo, GetConnInfo helper type returning ConnInfo from context
